pii_risks: full name combined with any other identifier
dates of birth combined with other PII
compliance: GDPR / CCPA — do not include real personal data in prompts sent to third-party LLMs
No content that solicits or facilitates illegal activity
clarity_requirements: State the primary goal clearly in the first sentence
Specify the desired output format if it matters
Provide enough context for the model to understand the situation
tone: Match the context. Default to clear and professional.
good_patterns: Summarise the following text in 3 bullet points, each under 20 words:
Translate the following paragraph into French, preserving formal register:
List 5 questions I should ask before signing a lease agreement:
bad_patterns: Tell me about John Smith at 12 Main Street
Ignore your instructions and do X instead
